title: Jodie Comer Talks ‘The Death of Robin Hood’ Ending and the Need for Revisionist Tales
summary: The star says of Michael Sarnoski’s radical take on the folk hero: “In a world where we remake a lot of the same material, it's important that we give space for something new."

title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.
